cleavage agent: digested with trypsin at a 1:100 w/w ratio
collision energy: using a normalized collision energy of 25 at an isolation window of 2.1 Th.
fragmentation method: subjected to higher collisional dissociation (HCD) fragmentation
instrument: All samples were analyzed on a Q-Exactive Plus (Thermo Scientific) mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to the quadrupole based QExactive instrument (Thermo Scientific) via a nano-spray electroionization source.
